message:
feat(core): add 'fern' to valid agent name nouns

Expand the valid agent name vocabulary by adding 'fern' to the
VALID_NOUNS list:

- Increases total valid combinations from 4,278 to 4,340
  (62 adjectives × 70 nouns)
- Update documentation comments to reflect new counts
- Update HashSet memory estimate comment (51KB → 52KB)

This provides more naming options for agent identity generation
while maintaining the adjective+noun naming convention.

Also includes minor server lib.rs adjustments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -742,7 +742,7 @@ QUOTA_INBOX_LIMIT_COUNT=0
 
 ### Agent Naming Rules
 - MUST be adjective+noun combinations (e.g., "GreenLake", "BlueDog")
-- 62 adjectives × 69 nouns = 4,278 valid combinations
+- 62 adjectives × 70 nouns = 4,340 valid combinations
 - Case-insensitive unique per project
 - NOT descriptive role names
